title: ListServerNeighborsRequest
description: ListServerNeighborsRequest schema from Amazon Application Discovery Service API

configurationId.description: Configuration ID of the server for which neighbors are being listed.

portInformationNeeded.description: Flag to indicate if port and protocol information is needed as part of the response.

neighborConfigurationIds.description: List of configuration IDs to test for one-hop-away. Mandatory parameter when PortInformationNeeded is true.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return in a single page of output.

nextToken.description: Token to retrieve the next set of results.
